empty.title: No orders yet
empty.body: When you buy from Vergeo5 vendors, your orders and tracking will appear here.

escrow.held: Your payment is held safely by Vergeo5 until you receive your order.
escrow.released: Funds were released to the vendor after fulfilment.
escrow.refunded: A refund is being returned to your mobile money wallet.
escrow.cod: Pay the vendor in cash or mobile money when you receive the order.

pickup.title: Pickup details
pickup.qrLabel: Show this QR code at the vendor
pickup.stubBody: Pickup QR and PIN will appear here when the vendor marks your order ready.

invoice.title: Receipt & invoice
invoice.stubHelp: PDF download will be available soon.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load your orders. Please try again.

confirm.title: Received your order?
confirm.body: Confirming releases payment from Vergeo5 escrow to the vendor. Only confirm when you have received everything.
confirm.trust: Held by Vergeo5 → Released to vendor
confirm.doneBody: Payment has been released to the vendor.
confirm.error: Could not confirm receipt. Please try again.

report.title: Report a problem
report.body: Tell us what went wrong. You can attach photos or a PDF as evidence.
report.descriptionPlaceholder: What happened? Include any details that help us investigate.
report.evidenceHelp: Up to 8 photos or PDFs, max 10 MB each.
report.successLane1: We have recorded your return request. Our returns team will guide you through the next steps.
report.successDispute: We opened a dispute and will investigate with the vendor.
report.successSupport: Our support team will contact you shortly.
report.successGuidance: The 48-hour return window has passed. Please contact support for help.
report.error: Could not submit your report. Please try again.

guidance.lane1: You are within the 48-hour window for a full return including delivery.
guidance.expired: The 48-hour return window has ended. Contact support for further options.

dispatch.title: Delivery updates
dispatch.empty: Dispatch details will appear here once your order is on the way.
